subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This servant of Thine, Áqá Ján, now yearneth to be immersed in the ocean of Thy forgiveness and to be dealt with through Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک آقا جان آن و حان ان تزج به فی بحور الغفران و تعامله بالفضل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
